titles.text: Mahjong Uranai Fortuna - Tsuki no Megami Tachi
麻雀占い フォルトゥーナ 月の女神たち
SuperLite 1500 Series: Mahjong Uranai Fortuna: Tsuki no Megami-tachi

roms.name: Mahjong Uranai Fortuna - Tsuki no Megami Tachi (Japan)

descriptions.text: If you have been seeking a way to play the ancient game of mahjong and possibly get your fortune read by an adorable girl, then Mahjong Uranai Fortuna ~Tsuki no Megami Tachi~ is just the groundbreaking game you are looking for.
